case_title: KUSHNER MARK VS AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.57 FILED BY KUSHNER MARK AS TO DEFENDANT AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
